market.macro_notes_md:
- **Iran:** Trump FORMALLY REJECTED Iran peace proposal over weekend. War continues. Brent +3.5% to $104.80; WTI near $99–$100. IEA warns 14M bpd disrupted. Hormuz closed since Feb.
- **Equities:** S&P +0.11%, Nasdaq -0.34%, Dow flat, Russell 2000 +0.76%. Muted, mixed session.
- **Gold:** $428–$434 (safe-haven bid on Iran escalation). JPMorgan year-end target $6,300/oz.
- **XLE divergence:** Energy ETF NOT following oil higher — bearish signal. Stop at $56.15 critical.
- **BTC:** Opened $82,164 (strongest since Jan 31), fell to $80,971 — failed $82,320 retest.
- **Fed:** 3.75%, unchanged. Rate cuts expected; supportive of growth/tech long-term.
